ocr_findings.description: '試験にはコレが出る！' rendered as '試験にはつしが出る！' — consistent icon-misread pattern.
HTML entity '>' appears in OCR before '試験にはコレが出る！' callout — not present in image; likely OCR artifact from blockquote rendering.

reviewer_notes: SWOT分析のやり方 page with internal/external environment classification rules and the SWOT matrix table. Table is captured correctly with all four quadrant entries (Strengths, Weaknesses, Opportunities, Threats) and their example bullet items. Only low-severity issues.
